GroundingDINO-base + SAM2 tiny tiled 15-frame sample at box/text threshold 0.05 reached recall 0.8333 and failed the detector+mask gate.
This is not DINO-X, not pickleball fine-tuned, and must not be promoted.

models.use: SAM2 tiny box-prompted mask checkpoint for RKT detector+mask gate 1
notes: Downloaded with huggingface_hub on 2026-07-01 into models/checkpoints/racket/sam2-hiera-tiny.
Local PyTorch MPS failed on SAM2 bicubic upsample; CPU inference was verified for this checkpoint.
Used only for real box-prompted masks after detector inference; it is not true corner or 6DoF evidence.

models.use: Failed local paddle-detector training probe for RKT detector gate diagnosis
notes: CPU training was stopped after two completed epochs because Outdoor validation recall stayed at 0.0024.
MPS training failed before producing weights with RuntimeError: view size is not compatible with input tensor's size and stride.
Detector-only 15-frame sample at conf=0.001 reached recall 0.4333 with 1152 detections; this checkpoint failed the RKT detector gate and must not be promoted.

models.use: Failed A100 paddle-detector training probe for RKT detector+mask gate diagnosis
models.source: Fine-tuned from models/checkpoints/yolo11n.pt on runs/cvat_imports/2026_06_30/yolo_datasets/paddle using pickleball-a100-spot-ase1a
notes: A100 training early-stopped after 21 epochs; best validation metrics were P=0.645, R=0.321, mAP50=0.322, mAP50-95=0.0954.
YOLO+SAM2 15-frame sample at conf=0.001 reached recall 1.0 but precision 0.0201 with 1489 detections; this was smoke-only and not gate verification.

Full-manifest detector-only sweep over 1426 reviewed rows at conf=0.001 reached overall recall 0.9240 but failed per-viewpoint recall because Outdoor was 0.8259; this checkpoint failed the RKT detector gate and must not be promoted.

models.use: Failed A100 high-resolution paddle-detector training probe for RKT detector gate diagnosis
models.source: Fine-tuned from models/checkpoints/yolo26s.pt on runs/cvat_imports/2026_06_30/yolo_datasets/paddle using pickleball-a100-spot-ase1a
notes: A100 training early-stopped after 21 epochs; best validation metrics were P=0.470, R=0.403, mAP50=0.356, mAP50-95=0.112.
Native Ultralytics validation at conf=0.001, imgsz=1280, batch=1, iou=0.25 on the 600-image validation split returned precision 0.4679 and recall 0.4010.
Batched full-manifest detector sweep attempts at imgsz=1280 failed with CUDA OOM at batch 16 and batch 4; no full-manifest pass was produced, and this checkpoint must not be promoted.

models.use: Non-default RF-DETR-L preview candidate for the frozen GPU reproduction gate
notes: Checkpoint identity and 135,954,129-byte size were pinned by runs/lanes/trk_detbench_20260716/report.json after rfdetr 1.8.3 download on the H100.
Pending preview operating point is RF-DETR-L native 704, COCO person class id 1, confidence floor 0.18; no imgsz analog or threshold sweep is permitted.
Install the runtime dependency without a repo-level version pin using `python -m pip install rfdetr`, then re-bake and record the GPU fleet snapshot before production reproduction.
YOLO26m remains the default. RF-DETR may be selected explicitly for its frozen reproduction, and missing RF-DETR assets fail loudly rather than falling back.

models.use: OSNet x1.0 ReID embedding checkpoint backing tracking.reid_model in best_stack.json (raw-pool global association appearance features)
models.source: https://github.com/KaiyangZhou/deep-person-reid/blob/master/docs/MODEL_ZOO.md (osnet_x1_0, Market1501, same-domain ReID row) via https://drive.google.com/uc?id=1vduhq5DpN2q1g4fYEZfPI17MJeh9qyrA -- this exact Google Drive file id is also the URL the installed torchreid==0.2.5 package's own reid_model_factory.py maps to the key 'osnet_x1_0_market1501.pt'
models.license: deep-person-reid code is MIT (LICENSE file, Copyright (c) 2018 Kaiyang Zhou; the installed torchreid==0.2.5 pip package is a separate MIT-licensed repackaging). The repo does not state a separate license for the pretrained checkpoint weights themselves. Market-1501 is the academic person-Re-ID benchmark dataset the weights were trained on; MODEL_ZOO.md reports 94.2% rank-1 / 82.6% mAP, 2.2M params, 0.98 GFLOPs for this row. No explicit weight-specific license or dataset-terms statement was found in the deep-person-reid README or MODEL_ZOO.md.
notes: Restored on 2026-07-10 in lane runs/lanes/reid_restore_20260710/: best_stack.json entries.tracking.reid_model already pinned models/checkpoints/osnet_x1_0_market1501.pt, but the file was absent from disk, and the same-day fixp commit (0bdabbe67) made the tracking stage fail loud (best_stack_asset_missing) instead of silently falling back to loose-pool tracks.

Downloaded via `.venv/bin/python -m gdown 'https://drive.google.com/uc?id=1vduhq5DpN2q1g4fYEZfPI17MJeh9qyrA' -O models/checkpoints/osnet_x1_0_market1501.pt` (gdown 6.1.0); resulting file is 10,399,605 bytes and is a raw torch OrderedDict state_dict (no wrapper key), which threed/racketsport/person_reid_diagnostics.py:_extract_state_dict already handles via its all-string-keys fallback branch.

repo_commit above is deep-person-reid master HEAD as of 2026-07-10 (docs/MODEL_ZOO.md source-of-truth for the download link); it does not pin the checkpoint file itself, which predates this commit -- gdown surfaced the Google Drive file's own last-modified timestamp as local mtime 2021-03-31.

Loader-verified for real: threed/racketsport/person_reid_diagnostics.py:_make_osnet_embedder builds torchreid.models.build_model('osnet_x1_0', num_classes=1000, loss='softmax', pretrained=False), loads this checkpoint with torch.load(map_location='cpu', weights_only=False), then load_state_dict(..., strict=False) after shape-filtering (_matching_state_dict). Ran directly via `.venv/bin/python scripts/racketsport/run_raw_pool_person_authority.py` (which calls the identical threed/racketsport/raw_pool_person_authority.run_raw_pool_authority_candidate that scripts/racketsport/process_video.py:_attempt_global_association calls) against a 20-frame-trimmed copy of runs/lanes/w7_critique_20260709/wolv_world/wolverine_mixed_0200_mid_steep_corner's tracked_detections.json/raw_tracked_detections.json/court_calibration.json paired with the real local video eval_clips/ball/wolverine_mixed_0200_mid_steep_corner/source.mp4. Result: status ok, 150 real 512-dim L2-normalized OSNet embeddings extracted on cpu (runs/lanes/reid_restore_20260710/smoke_raw_pool/out/reid_embeddings.json), recorded model_sha256 matched this file's sha256, tracks.json produced.
Internal/private posture: owner-approved on 2026-07-13 for this project's private development and testing.
Commercial posture: re-verify the pretrained-checkpoint and Market-1501 dataset terms at NS-07.3 before monetized launch; research_ok_verify_checkpoint_terms remains binding for commercial use.
ENV-2 partial inventory captured from the running H100 container on 2026-06-26 PDT.
available_on_h100 means the file was present and hashed on the current named GPU host/path in local_path; it does not prove phase acceptance.

Fast-SAM-3D-Body H100 smoke latency is recorded on the fast_sam_3d_body_dinov3 entry; EVAL-0 still requires real test clips, comparison artifacts, and the human approval gate before any variant is locked.
pending_download entries are next candidates for Codex to fetch or mirror without user input unless their upstream requires account-gated access.
